question: Can an equal-weight 60/90/120-day positive-momentum spot ensemble over AVAX/DOT/NEAR earn positive untouched-period returns while preserving capital in the later confirmation period?
development_gate: data PASS; ensemble base/stress total >0; max drawdown >-40% and >=15 percentage points better than half-long; turnover <=20
evaluation_gate: ensemble base/stress total >0; >=1 positive year; max drawdown >-40% and below half-long
confirmation_gate: ensemble base/stress >=-10%; max drawdown >-25% and below half-long; compounded evaluation+confirmation >0
holdout_release_rule: Reuse exposed development only after checkpoint; fetch evaluation only after pass; fetch confirmation only after evaluation pass
